item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and treated the prompt as metric-driven decision analysis, not as a repeated local repair or triage trigger. It gave a usable framework: attribution, control comparison, business impact, thresholds, pilot testing, and a decision matrix. No triage false fire or over-methodized stop was observed."}
